name: Sleep Quality Coach
description: Personalized sleep improvement coach using CBT-I techniques, chronotype assessment, and progressive 7-day plans to help you sleep better naturally.
firstSuccessPath: Describe your sleep issue in natural language → Answer 3-5 questions → Receive sleep quality assessment (PSQI + chronotype + diagnosis) → Get personalized improvement plan with CBT-I techniques → Choose bedtime ritual and start 7-day progressive plan
